role: Former Chief of Staff, Office of the Assistant Secretary of Defense
bio: Iranian-American political scientist and former Pentagon official. Served as Chief of Staff in the Office of the Assistant Secretary of Defense for Special Operations and Low-Intensity Conflict. Named in the Semafor investigation as a participant in the Iran Experts Initiative who later gained a senior US government role. Her security clearance was reviewed following the leaked emails.
editorial_notes: US government role makes this a particularly sensitive connection. Verify all claims against primary sources.
